_meta.description: 神兽名录：山海经为主，兼收搜神记/淮南子/神异经/庄子/列子。appearance 为简体中文外貌描述，供提示词模板填充。名单可扩展，新增字段保持一致即可。

beasts.name: 九尾狐
beasts.appearance: 状如狐而九尾，音如婴儿啼，身有赤黄纹
beasts.appearance_en: a fox-like beast with nine lush tails and reddish-yellow stripes
beasts.symbolism: 祥瑞之兽，亦食人；后世视为狐仙始祖

beasts.name: 凤凰
beasts.appearance: 五色备举，鸡形，首文曰德，翼文曰顺，背文曰义
beasts.appearance_en: a phoenix-like bird with plumage in five colors, a chicken-like body, with patterns of virtue on its head, compliance on its wings, and righteousness on its back

beasts.name: 鸾鸟
beasts.appearance: 状如翟而五采文
beasts.appearance_en: a bird like a long-tailed pheasant with five-colored plumage, gentle and radiant

beasts.name: 烛龙
beasts.appearance: 人面蛇身而赤，身长千里，睁眼为昼闭眼为夜，吹为冬呼为夏
beasts.appearance_en: a red, human-faced serpentine god thousands of miles long; opens eyes for day, closes for night, blows for winter, exhales for summer

beasts.name: 帝江
beasts.appearance: 状如黄囊，赤如丹火，六足四翼，浑敦无面目
beasts.symbolism: 识歌舞，四凶之一（乐神/原初）
beasts.appearance_en: a yellow sack-like being, red as cinnabar fire, with six legs and four wings, faceless and chaotic

beasts.name: 饕餮
beasts.appearance: 羊身人面，目在腋下，虎齿人爪，音如婴儿
beasts.appearance_en: a beast with a sheep's body and a human face, eyes under the armpits, tiger teeth and human claws, crying like a baby

beasts.name: 穷奇
beasts.appearance: 状如牛，猬毛，音如獆狗；一说如虎有翼
beasts.appearance_en: a beast like an ox with hedgehog-like bristles, howling like a hunting dog; alternatively a tiger with wings

beasts.name: 毕方
beasts.appearance: 状如鹤，一足，赤文青质而白喙
beasts.appearance_en: a crane-like bird with one leg, red markings on a green body and a white beak

beasts.name: 狰
beasts.appearance: 状如赤豹，五尾一角，音如击石
beasts.appearance_en: a beast like a reddish leopard, with five tails and one horn, cry like striking stone

beasts.name: 鹿蜀
beasts.appearance: 状如马，白首，文题，虎尾
beasts.appearance_en: a horse-like beast with a white head, patterned forehead, and a tiger's tail

beasts.name: 猼訑
beasts.appearance: 状如羊，九尾四耳，目在背
beasts.appearance_en: a sheep-like beast with nine tails, four ears, and eyes on its back

beasts.name: 鵸鵌
beasts.appearance: 状如乌，三首六尾，善笑
beasts.appearance_en: a crow-like bird with three heads and six tails, given to laughing

beasts.name: 当康
beasts.appearance: 状如豚而有牙，鸣自叫其名
beasts.appearance_en: a pig-like beast with tusks, calling out its own name

beasts.name: 朱厌
beasts.appearance: 状如猿，白首赤足
beasts.appearance_en: an ape-like beast with a white head and red feet

beasts.name: 天狗
beasts.appearance: 状如狸而白首，音如猫
beasts.appearance_en: a raccoon-dog-like beast with a white head, mewing like a cat

beasts.name: 蛊雕
beasts.appearance: 状如雕，独角，音如婴儿，食人
beasts.appearance_en: a hawk-like bird with one horn, crying like a baby, man-eating

beasts.name: 䑏疏
beasts.appearance: 状如马，一角
beasts.appearance_en: a horse-like beast with one horn

beasts.name: 耳鼠
beasts.appearance: 状如鼠，兔首麋耳，以其尾飞
beasts.appearance_en: a mouse-like beast with a rabbit's head and deer's ears, gliding with its tail

beasts.name: 孟极
beasts.appearance: 状如豹，文题白身，善伏
beasts.appearance_en: a leopard-like beast with a patterned white body, good at lurking

beasts.name: 长右
beasts.appearance: 状如猿，四耳
beasts.appearance_en: an ape-like beast with four ears

beasts.name: 羬羊
beasts.appearance: 状如羊，马尾，角大
beasts.appearance_en: a sheep-like beast with a horse's tail and large horns

beasts.name: 乘黄
beasts.appearance: 状如狐，背上有角
beasts.appearance_en: a fox-like beast with a horn on its back

beasts.name: 文鳐鱼
beasts.appearance: 状如鲤鱼，鱼身而鸟翼，苍文
beasts.appearance_en: a fish like a carp, with a fish body and bird wings, dark-patterned

beasts.name: 夫诸
beasts.appearance: 状如白鹿，四角
beasts.appearance_en: a white deer-like beast with four horns

beasts.name: 灌灌
beasts.appearance: 状如鸠，音如呵
beasts.appearance_en: a dove-like bird, cry like scolding

beasts.name: 鴸
beasts.appearance: 状如鸱，人手，音如痹
beasts.appearance_en: an owl-like bird with human hands, cry like a palsy

beasts.name: 獙獙
beasts.appearance: 状如狐，有翼，音如鸿
beasts.appearance_en: a fox-like beast with wings, cry like a wild goose

beasts.name: 诸犍
beasts.appearance: 状如豹，长尾，人首
beasts.appearance_en: a leopard-like beast with a long tail and a human head

beasts.name: 颙
beasts.appearance: 状如枭，人面四目，音如鸣
beasts.appearance_en: an owl-like bird with a human face and four eyes, cry like a bell

beasts.name: 应龙
beasts.appearance: 龙身而有翼，蓄水
beasts.appearance_en: a dragon with a serpentine body and wings, controlling water

beasts.name: 开明兽
beasts.appearance: 身大类虎，九首人面
beasts.appearance_en: a beast with a body larger than a tiger, with nine human heads

beasts.name: 陆吾
beasts.appearance: 状如虎，九尾，人面虎爪
beasts.appearance_en: a tiger-like beast with nine tails and a human face with tiger claws

beasts.name: 英招
beasts.appearance: 马身人面，虎文而鸟翼
beasts.appearance_en: a beast with a horse's body and human face, tiger stripes and bird wings

beasts.name: 九凤
beasts.appearance: 九首人面鸟身
beasts.appearance_en: a bird with nine human heads and a bird body

beasts.name: 比翼鸟
beasts.appearance: 状如凫，一翼一目，需成对而飞
beasts.appearance_en: a duck-like bird with one wing and one eye, flying only in pairs

beasts.name: 胜遇
beasts.appearance: 状如翟，赤色，食鱼
beasts.appearance_en: a pheasant-like red bird that eats fish

beasts.name: 狡
beasts.appearance: 状如犬，豹文，牛角，音如吠犬
beasts.appearance_en: a dog-like beast with leopard spots and ox horns, barking like a dog

beasts.name: 肥遗
beasts.appearance: 状如蛇，一首两身
beasts.appearance_en: a snake-like creature with one head and two bodies

beasts.name: 蜚
beasts.appearance: 状如牛，白首，一目，蛇尾
beasts.appearance_en: a bull-like beast with a white head, one eye, and a snake's tail

beasts.name: 驳
beasts.appearance: 状如马，白身黑尾，一角，虎爪
beasts.appearance_en: a horse-like beast with a white body, black tail, one horn, and tiger claws

beasts.name: 西王母
beasts.appearance: 状如人，豹尾虎齿，善啸，蓬发戴胜
beasts.appearance_en: a human-like goddess with a leopard's tail, tiger's teeth, disheveled hair and a headdress, given to howling

beasts.name: 强良
beasts.appearance: 衔蛇操蛇，虎首人身
beasts.appearance_en: a being with a tiger's head and human body, biting and holding snakes

beasts.name: 胐胐
beasts.appearance: 状如狸，白尾
beasts.appearance_en: a raccoon-dog-like beast with a white tail

beasts.name: 玃如
beasts.appearance: 状如鹿，白尾，马足人手
beasts.appearance_en: a deer-like beast with a white tail, horse hooves and human hands

beasts.name: 蠃鱼
beasts.appearance: 鱼身鸟翼，音如鸳鸯
beasts.appearance_en: a fish with a bird's wings, cry like a mandarin duck

beasts.name: 鸣蛇
beasts.appearance: 状如蛇，四翼，音如磬
beasts.appearance_en: a snake-like creature with four wings, cry like a chime

beasts.name: 鲛人
beasts.appearance: 人面鱼身，泣泪成珠
beasts.appearance_en: a merman with a human face and fish body, whose tears become pearls

beasts.name: 化蛇
beasts.appearance: 人面豺身，鸟翼蛇行，音如叱呼
beasts.appearance_en: a being with a human face and jackal body, bird wings and snake movement, cry like shouting

beasts.name: 讹兽
beasts.appearance: 状如兔，人面，言妄语
beasts.appearance_en: a rabbit-like beast with a human face, speaking lies

beasts.name: 白泽
beasts.appearance: 狮身羊角，通万物之情，能言
beasts.appearance_en: a lion-bodied beast with ram's horns, knowing all things, able to speak

beasts.name: 鲲
beasts.appearance: 北冥巨鱼，不知其几千里也
beasts.appearance_en: a gigantic fish in the northern ocean, thousands of miles long

beasts.name: 鹏
beasts.appearance: 巨鸟，其翼若垂天之云，抟扶摇而上九万里
beasts.appearance_en: a gigantic bird whose wings are like clouds hanging from the sky, soaring ninety thousand miles

beasts.name: 混沌
beasts.appearance: 无七窍，倏忽凿之而死
beasts.appearance_en: a formless being with no seven orifices (eyes, ears, mouth, nostrils)

beasts.name: 倏
beasts.appearance: 倏忽为混沌凿七窍者
beasts.appearance_en: a diminutive emperor-personification of suddenness, who helped bore holes into Hundun

beasts.name: 忽
beasts.appearance: 倏忽为混沌凿七窍者
beasts.appearance_en: a diminutive emperor-personification of abruptness, who helped bore holes into Hundun

beasts.name: 焦侥
beasts.appearance: 小人国，长三尺
beasts.appearance_en: a tiny person of the small-country, only three feet tall

beasts.name: 龙伯国
beasts.appearance: 巨人国，一钓而连六鳌
beasts.appearance_en: a giant person of the giant-country, who hooks six giant turtles with one line

beasts.name: 青龙
beasts.appearance: 四象之东方，龙形，木德
beasts.appearance_en: the Azure Dragon, eastern of the Four Symbols, a dragon form with wood virtue

beasts.name: 白虎
beasts.appearance: 四象之西方，虎形，金德
beasts.appearance_en: the White Tiger, western of the Four Symbols, a tiger form with metal virtue

beasts.name: 朱雀
beasts.appearance: 四象之南方，凤鸟类，火德（非凤凰）
beasts.appearance_en: the Vermilion Bird, southern of the Four Symbols, a phoenix-like bird with fire virtue

beasts.name: 玄武
beasts.appearance: 四象之北方，龟蛇合体，水德
beasts.appearance_en: the Black Tortoise, northern of the Four Symbols, a turtle-snake composite with water virtue

beasts.name: 腾蛇
beasts.appearance: 龙属，能兴云雾
beasts.appearance_en: a dragon-kind winged serpent able to raise clouds and mist

beasts.name: 飞廉
beasts.appearance: 风伯，鹿身雀首，通风云
beasts.appearance_en: the wind god, with a deer's body and a bird's head, channeling wind and clouds

beasts.name: 火鼠
beasts.appearance: 火中鼠，毛可织火浣布
beasts.appearance_en: a rat living in fire, whose fur can be woven into fire-proof cloth

beasts.name: 祸斗
beasts.appearance: 状如犬，食火，喷火
beasts.appearance_en: a dog-like beast that eats and spits fire

beasts.name: 九婴
beasts.appearance: 水火之怪，有九首
beasts.appearance_en: a water-and-fire monster with nine heads

beasts.name: 猰貐
beasts.appearance: 龙首，食人
beasts.appearance_en: a beast with a dragon's head, man-eating

beasts.name: 梼杌
beasts.appearance: 状如虎，犬毛，长二尺，人面虎足猪口牙
beasts.appearance_en: a tiger-like beast with dog fur, two feet long, a human face, tiger feet, and pig-like mouth and teeth

beasts.name: 麒麟
beasts.appearance: 麋身牛尾，马蹄，一角，黄色，仁兽
beasts.appearance_en: a chimeric qilin: a gentle deer-like body with an ox's tail, horse's hooves, and a single fleshy horn on its forehead; golden or multicolored fur, serene and dignified
beasts.symbolism: 仁兽，王者将至则现，象征祥瑞

beasts.name: 貔貅
beasts.appearance: 状如虎豹，首尾似龙，有翼，无肛，纳食不泄
beasts.appearance_en: a winged dragon-lion beast with a fierce tiger-leopard body, a dragon-like head, feathered wings, and no anus (symbolizing wealth retention); sharp fangs

beasts.name: 獬豸
beasts.appearance: 状如羊或鹿，独角，性忠直
beasts.appearance_en: a unicorn-like ram or deer with a single straight horn on its forehead; upright, solemn, righteous bearing
beasts.symbolism: 法兽，能辨曲直、触不直者

beasts.name: 甪端
beasts.appearance: 状如狮，独角，绿毛，通四夷语
beasts.appearance_en: a lion-like auspicious beast with a twisted single horn, green fur and a curly mane; wise, intelligent expression
beasts.symbolism: 瑞兽，日行万里，通晓四方语言

beasts.name: 天禄
beasts.appearance: 状如兽，有翼，双角，似辟邪
beasts.appearance_en: a winged chimera with two horns, akin to Bixie; a lion-dragon body, fierce yet auspicious
beasts.symbolism: 瑞兽，与辟邪并立，镇墓招福

beasts.name: 辟邪
beasts.appearance: 状如狮，有翼，独角或无角，张口
beasts.appearance_en: a winged lion-like beast with one horn (or hornless), an open mouth and feathered wings; protective and fierce

beasts.name: 驺虞
beasts.appearance: 状如白虎，五采毕具，尾长于身，不履生草
beasts.appearance_en: a white tiger with black stripes and a tail longer than its body; gentle, treading on no living grass

beasts.name: 龙
beasts.appearance: 蛇身鹿角，狮鬃鱼鳞，鹰爪，能幽能明，能细能巨
beasts.appearance_en: a serpentine Chinese dragon with a deer's antlers, a lion's mane, fish scales, eagle claws and long whiskers; coiling, luminous body
beasts.symbolism: 神兽之首，司云雨，华夏图腾

beasts.name: 三足乌
beasts.source: 山海经·大荒东经/淮南子
beasts.appearance: 日中神鸟，三足，色赤或金，载日
beasts.appearance_en: a three-legged crow (golden or black-red) radiating sunlight; perched within the sun

beasts.name: 重明鸟
beasts.appearance: 状如鸡，鸣如凤，一目两瞳，能搏猛兽妖邪
beasts.appearance_en: a large bird like a pheasant with two pupils in each eye, multicolored plumage and a hooked beak; fierce

beasts.name: 精卫
beasts.appearance: 状如乌，赤足赤喙，文首，衔石填海
beasts.appearance_en: a small variegated bird (crow-like) with a red beak and red claws, tirelessly carrying twigs and pebbles
beasts.symbolism: 炎帝少女所化，填海不屈

beasts.name: 青鸟
beasts.source: 山海经·西山经/司马相如
beasts.appearance: 青色神鸟，赤首黑目，西王母使者
beasts.appearance_en: a slender cyan-blue celestial bird with a red head and black eyes; elegant long tail

beasts.name: 商羊
beasts.appearance: 一足鸟，身有纹，知雨而舞
beasts.appearance_en: a one-legged bird, slender, with patterned plumage, standing on a single leg

beasts.name: 玉兔
beasts.appearance: 月中白兔，捣药于臼
beasts.appearance_en: a white jade rabbit sitting and pounding medicine with a mortar and pestle under moonlight

beasts.name: 三足金蟾
beasts.appearance: 三足金蟾，状如蛙，口衔铜钱
beasts.appearance_en: a three-legged golden toad, squat and round, often holding a coin in its mouth

beasts.name: 巴蛇
beasts.appearance: 巨蛇，身长百寻，食象，三岁而出骨
beasts.appearance_en: an enormous serpent as thick as a tree trunk, long enough to swallow an elephant whole

beasts.name: 相柳
beasts.appearance: 九首蛇身，人面，所过为泽溪，毒
beasts.appearance_en: a nine-headed serpentine water monster with a human-like face on each head, oozing virulent poison

beasts.name: 囚牛
beasts.source: 中国民间·龙生九子（升庵集）
beasts.appearance: 龙长子，好音乐，形如龙而温，饰于琴头
beasts.appearance_en: the eldest dragon son, fond of music; a gentle dragon-faced creature carved on stringed instruments

beasts.name: 睚眦
beasts.source: 中国民间·龙生九子（升庵集）
beasts.appearance: 龙次子，好斗，龙首怒目，饰于刀剑吞口
beasts.appearance_en: the second dragon son, fond of fighting; dragon-headed with a fierce glare, carved on sword hilts

beasts.name: 嘲风
beasts.source: 中国民间·龙生九子（升庵集）
beasts.appearance: 龙三子，好险，形似龙猫，踞于殿角
beasts.appearance_en: the third dragon son, fond of danger; dragon-cat-like, perched on roof-ridge corners

beasts.name: 蒲牢
beasts.source: 中国民间·龙生九子（升庵集）
beasts.appearance: 龙四子，好鸣，状如龙而小，饰于钟钮
beasts.appearance_en: the fourth dragon son, fond of roaring; a small dragon-shaped being on bell handles

beasts.name: 狻猊
beasts.source: 中国民间·龙生九子（升庵集）
beasts.appearance: 龙五子，好坐好烟，状如狮，踞于香炉
beasts.appearance_en: the fifth dragon son, fond of sitting and smoke; lion-like, seated on incense burners

beasts.name: 霸下
beasts.source: 中国民间·龙生九子（升庵集）
beasts.appearance: 龙六子，好负重，龟形龙首，驮石碑
beasts.appearance_en: the sixth dragon son, fond of carrying weight; a turtle-like body with a dragon head, bearing stone steles

beasts.name: 狴犴
beasts.source: 中国民间·龙生九子（升庵集）
beasts.appearance: 龙七子，好讼，形似虎，立于狱门
beasts.appearance_en: the seventh dragon son, fond of justice; tiger-like dragon, on prison gates

beasts.name: 负屃
beasts.source: 中国民间·龙生九子（升庵集）
beasts.appearance: 龙八子，好文，盘绕于碑文之上
beasts.appearance_en: the eighth dragon son, fond of literature; a dragon coiled around stele inscriptions

beasts.name: 螭吻
beasts.source: 中国民间·龙生九子（升庵集）
beasts.appearance: 龙九子，好吞火，龙首鱼身，踞殿脊
beasts.appearance_en: the ninth dragon son, fond of swallowing fire; dragon-headed fish-like, on roof ridges facing inward

beasts.name: 椒图
beasts.source: 中国民间·龙生九子（升庵集）
beasts.appearance: 龙子，好闭，形似螺，衔环于门
beasts.appearance_en: a dragon son fond of closing; snail- or dragon-shaped, on door knockers and rings

beasts.name: 句芒
beasts.appearance: 东方木神，鸟身人面，乘两龙
beasts.appearance_en: the eastern wood deity: a bird-bodied, human-faced green god riding two dragons

beasts.name: 蓐收
beasts.appearance: 西方金神，人面虎爪，白毛，执钺
beasts.appearance_en: the western metal deity: a white, human-faced being with tiger claws, holding an axe

beasts.name: 祝融
beasts.appearance: 南方火神，兽身人面，乘两龙
beasts.appearance_en: the southern fire deity: a red, beast-bodied human-faced god riding dragons, wreathed in flame

beasts.name: 玄冥
beasts.appearance: 北方水神，人面鸟身或鱼身，乘两龙
beasts.appearance_en: the northern water deity: a black, human-faced bird- or fish-bodied god, sometimes entwined with snakes

beasts.name: 刑天
beasts.appearance: 无首战神，以乳为目，以脐为口，操干戚
beasts.appearance_en: a headless warrior god with nipples as eyes and navel as mouth, wielding a shield and axe

beasts.name: 夸父
beasts.appearance: 逐日巨人，珥两黄蛇，手持杖
beasts.appearance_en: a towering giant chasing the sun, with two yellow snakes as earrings and a wooden staff

beasts.name: 蚩尤
beasts.appearance: 战神，铜头铁额，牛角，八肱八趾，人身牛蹄
beasts.appearance_en: a bronze-headed war deity with ox horns, multiple arms and ox hooves, clad in armor; fearsome

beasts.name: 雷神
beasts.appearance: 龙身人头，鼓其腹则雷
beasts.appearance_en: a thunder god with a serpentine dragon body and a human head, beating his belly like a drum

beasts.name: 雨师
beasts.appearance: 司雨之神，状或为人持瓶，或为鸟形
beasts.appearance_en: the rain master, shown as an old man with a water vessel or a bird-dragon, surrounded by rainfall

beasts.name: 河伯
beasts.appearance: 黄河水神，人面鱼身或乘龙车
beasts.appearance_en: the Yellow River god, a human with a fish tail or riding a water beast/dragon chariot

beasts.name: 旱魃
beasts.appearance: 旱神，衣青衣，所居不雨，枯瘦
beasts.appearance_en: a drought goddess, often a shriveled, heat-radiating figure in green robes; parched

beasts.name: 天马
beasts.appearance: 状如白犬而黑头，或马形，乘之寿
beasts.appearance_en: a heavenly horse, white-bodied with a black head, swift as wind (or winged)

beasts.name: 陵鱼
beasts.appearance: 人面鱼身，手足如人，居海中
beasts.appearance_en: a mermaid-like being with a human face and fish body, with human-like hands on its body

beasts.name: 九色鹿
beasts.appearance: 身披九色毛、角白如雪、体态优雅的鹿
beasts.appearance_en: a graceful deer with nine-colored fur and snow-white antlers, serene and elegant
beasts.symbolism: 善良、救赎、佛教本生故事

beasts.name: 年兽
beasts.appearance: 头生独角、口如盆、身披鳞甲的猛兽，惧红色、火光与响声
beasts.appearance_en: a formidable beast with a single horn, a basin-like maw and a scale-covered body, fearful of red, fire and loud noises

beasts.name: 夕
beasts.appearance: 形似年兽而更瘦长、独目、长尾的食人恶兽
beasts.appearance_en: a thinner, longer version of the Nian beast with a single eye and a long tail, a man-eating monster

beasts.name: 螭龙
beasts.appearance: 无角小龙，盘曲矫健，常作玉器纹饰
beasts.appearance_en: a small hornless dragon with a coiling, agile body, often seen as a jade ornament motif

beasts.name: 虬龙
beasts.appearance: 有角的小龙，蜿蜒盘绕， youthful dragon
beasts.appearance_en: a young dragon with small horns, sinuous and coiling

beasts.name: 蟠龙
beasts.appearance: 未升天的盘曲伏龙，身缠云气
beasts.appearance_en: a coiled dragon resting among clouds, not yet ascended to heaven

beasts.name: 蛟
beasts.appearance: 似龙而无角、头有红额、能兴洪水的龙属
beasts.appearance_en: a dragon-like creature without horns, with a red mark on its forehead, capable of raising floods

beasts.name: 谛听
beasts.source: 佛教·地藏菩萨坐骑传说
beasts.appearance: 形似白狮、虎头、独角、犬耳、龙身、虎爪的灵兽
beasts.appearance_en: a white lion-like spirit beast with a tiger head, a single horn, dog ears, a dragon body and tiger claws, receptive to all sounds

beasts.name: 朝天吼
beasts.appearance: 形如犬而高大、昂首向天嘶吼的镇兽
beasts.appearance_en: a large dog-like beast with its head raised skyward, roaring; a guardian atop palace pillars
beasts.symbolism: 守望、上传天意下达民情

beasts.name: 金翅大鹏
beasts.appearance: 金身巨鸟，展翅蔽日，以龙为食
beasts.appearance_en: a giant golden bird with wings that block the sun, feeding on dragons; a divine bird of Buddhist lore

beasts.name: 白象
beasts.appearance: 六牙白象，温润庄严
beasts.appearance_en: a majestic white elephant with six tusks, gentle and dignified

beasts.name: 青狮
beasts.appearance: 青毛雄狮，鬃发威猛
beasts.appearance_en: a mighty green-maned lion, fierce and regal

beasts.name: 哮天犬
beasts.appearance: 二郎神座下细腰猎犬，善奔袭
beasts.appearance_en: a slim-bodied hunting hound belonging to Erlang, swift and loyal

beasts.name: 孰湖
beasts.appearance: 马身鸟翼、人面蛇尾的异兽
beasts.appearance_en: a beast with a horse body, bird wings, a human face and a snake tail

beasts.name: 兕
beasts.appearance: 形似水牛、通体青黑、独角如玉的猛兽
beasts.appearance_en: a water-buffalo-like beast, entirely dark blue-black, with a single jade-like horn; fierce

beasts.name: 钦原
beasts.appearance: 似蜂、大小如鸳鸯、剧毒的鸟
beasts.appearance_en: a bird resembling a giant bee, the size of a mandarin duck, extremely venomous

beasts.name: 鹑鸟
beasts.appearance: 凤属神鸟，赤羽、头有冠
beasts.appearance_en: a phoenix-kind sacred bird with red plumage and a crested head

beasts.name: 冉遗鱼
beasts.appearance: 鱼身蛇首、六足、目如马鬃的鱼
beasts.appearance_en: a fish with a snake head, six legs, and horse-mane-like eyes

beasts.name: 何罗鱼
beasts.appearance: 一首十身、音如吠犬的怪鱼
beasts.appearance_en: a strange fish with one head and ten bodies, barking like a dog

beasts.name: 鯥
beasts.appearance: 鱼身蛇尾、有翼、冬死夏生的鱼
beasts.appearance_en: a fish with a snake tail and wings, dying in winter and reviving in summer

beasts.name: 猾褢
beasts.appearance: 人面、长臂、浑身猪毛的兽，见则天下大旱
beasts.appearance_en: a beast with a human face, long arms, and pig-like bristles; its appearance foretells drought

beasts.name: 獓因
beasts.appearance: 形似牛、红身、人脸、马足的凶兽
beasts.appearance_en: a fierce beast like an ox, red-bodied, with a human face and horse hooves

beasts.name: 讙
beasts.appearance: 形似狸猫、白尾、独目的兽，可御凶
beasts.appearance_en: a cat-like beast with a white tail and a single eye, able to ward off evil

beasts.name: 太岁
beasts.appearance: 土中肉块、无骨无眼、状如活体的精怪
beasts.appearance_en: a fleshy boneless blob found in the earth, eyeless and pulsing, said to be a living entity

beasts.name: 当扈
beasts.appearance: 人面、雉身、具一足、食其髯可飞的山鸟
beasts.appearance_en: a pheasant-like bird with a human face and one leg; eating its neck-feathers is said to grant flight

beasts.name: 鳛鳛鱼
beasts.appearance: 状如鹊、十翼、鳞皆在羽端、音如鹊的带翼鱼
beasts.appearance_en: a fish shaped like a magpie with ten wings, scales at the wing tips, crying like a magpie
